title: Davie's Differentiated Services (DiffServ) Architecture Model
description: A flowchart illustrating the path of a packet through the key components of a router implementing Davie's DiffServ model for quality of service (QoS).
relationships: Packets enter the system and are first classified
The meter measures the packet stream against a traffic profile
Based on the meter's result, the marker may set the DSCP value
The shaper delays packets to enforce compliance with a traffic profile
The dropper discards non-compliant packets to enforce the profile
The packet scheduler finally forwards packets out an interface based on their priority
